items.title: Double Bonus Hollander POTD James Cotton. Long Beach State SG was drafted 32nd by SEA in 97. Played 19 games and 92 minutes from 97-99 for SEA before being waived. Later played in Australia. Brother Schea played at Alabama and abroad too.

items.title: Steph Curry called it “premature” to discuss LeBron James to the Warriors but acknowledged the “allure” of it:
items.author: Anthony Slater
items.body_excerpt:
Steph Curry called it “premature” to discuss LeBron James to the Warriors but acknowledged the “allure” of it: 

“Him going into his 24th season, me into my 18th, the battles we’ve had, that would be such a unique story in NBA history, in sports history.”
